mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merchant WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sales DESC, rating DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM merchant WHERE status = 1
SELECT * FROM merchant WHERE status = 1 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY sales DESC, rating DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM merchant WHERE status = 1 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant (username, password, phone, email, name, address, description, logo, rating, sales, status, business_status, wechat_app_id, wechat_mch_id, wechat_api_key, wechat_notify_url, alipay_app_id, alipay_private_key, alipay_public_key, alipay_gateway_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{name}, #{address}, #{description}, #{logo}, #{rating}, #{sales}, #{status}, #{businessStatus}, #{wechatAppId}, #{wechatMchId}, #{wechatApiKey}, #{wechatNotifyUrl}, #{alipayAppId}, #{alipayPrivateKey}, #{alipayPublicKey}, #{alipayGatewayUrl}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant SET business_status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE merchant SET sales = #{sales}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE merchant SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, description = #{description}, logo = #{logo}, wechat_app_id = #{wechatAppId}, wechat_mch_id = #{wechatMchId}, wechat_api_key = #{wechatApiKey}, wechat_notify_url = #{wechatNotifyUrl}, alipay_app_id = #{alipayAppId}, alipay_private_key = #{alipayPrivateKey}, alipay_public_key = #{alipayPublicKey}, alipay_gateway_url = #{alipayGatewayUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
